query:
-- PRUEBA 1: Flujo normal - Cambiar a "entregado"
-- Primero, obtener un proyecto activo
SELECT 'ANTES DE CAMBIO' as paso, id, name, status, isArchived 
FROM projects 
WHERE isArchived = 0 
ORDER BY id DESC 
LIMIT 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute 
-- PRUEBA 1: Flujo normal - Cambiar a "entregado"
-- Primero, obtener un proyecto activo
SELECT 'ANTES DE CAMBIO' as paso, id, name, status, isArchived 
FROM projects 
WHERE isArchived = 0 
ORDER BY id DESC 
LIMIT 1;
